title: Chopper Hears the Invitation
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on chopper hears the invitation, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Hears the Invitation. Kureha hides her feelings behind cruelty, pushing Chopper toward the sea and the life Hiriluk wanted for him. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: What are a country's laws good for!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No one was sick all along

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What's so wrong about wanting to uphold kindness and sympathy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Listen up, everyone. I want all of you to take cover,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stupid Hippo! Didn't expect that, did ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And you didn't expect this, did ya?
